Home / Services / Deck & Patio Cleaning

Deck & Patio Cleaning

Revitalize your outdoor living space with our deck and patio cleaning service.

Decks and patios are vulnerable to dirt, algae, mold, and other unsightly stains. Our deck and patio cleaning service uses specialized cleaning solutions and low-pressure power washing to safely and effectively remove these stains and restore your outdoor living space. We take care to protect your landscaping and outdoor furniture during the cleaning process.

We understand that Sacramento's hot summers and mild winters can create the perfect environment for algae and mold growth on decks and patios. Our cleaning solutions are designed to kill these organisms and prevent them from returning. We also offer sealing services to protect your deck or patio from future damage.

Whether you have a wooden deck in Land Park or a concrete patio in Roseville, we have the expertise to get the job done right. We'll work with you to determine the best cleaning approach for your specific needs and budget.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Inspection of your deck or patio.
  2. 02 Step 2: Application of our cleaning solution.
  3. 03 Step 3: Gentle power washing to remove stains and dirt.
  4. 04 Step 4: Rinsing and final inspection.

Benefits

  • Improved appearance of your deck or patio
  • Removal of algae and mold
  • Extended lifespan of your deck or patio
  • Enhanced outdoor living experience

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of cleaner do you use on decks?

We use a specialized wood cleaner that is safe for all types of wood, including redwood, cedar, and pressure-treated lumber. It is designed to gently remove dirt, algae, and mold without damaging the wood fibers.

Will power washing damage my deck?

No, we use low-pressure settings and specialized nozzles to avoid damaging your deck. We'll assess the wood type and condition to determine the appropriate cleaning approach.

Do I need to move my furniture?

Yes, we ask that you remove any furniture or other items from your deck or patio before we arrive.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with deck & patio cleaning? Contact us today.
